svg.title: IPTV M3U Bot — Halcyon-style promo banner
svg.desc: A Halcyon-themed promotional image for the ashik4u/iptv-m3u-bot GitHub project, showing a dark blue background, project title, description, and a terminal mockup.
svg.text: Fetches multiple IPTV M3U playlists, checks each stream, and combines working ones into a single .m3u
